events.title: US Strikes Iran in Response to Helicopter Downing
events.desc: The United States conducted airstrikes against Iran in retaliation for Iran's alleged downing of a US Apache helicopter over the Strait of Hormuz. President Trump vowed further, severe retaliation if a peace deal is not reached, escalating tensions in the region.

events.title: Israeli Airstrikes Kill 13 in Southern Lebanon
events.desc: Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon resulted in the deaths of at least 13 people, according to Lebanese security sources. The strikes targeted villages including Dayr Debba, intensifying the conflict between Israel and Hezbollah, which claimed fresh attacks against Israeli forces.

events.title: Pakistani Air Strikes Kill at Least 13 in Afghanistan
events.desc: The Afghan Taliban government reported that Pakistani air strikes in Kunar, Khost, and Paktika provinces killed at least 13 people, including 11 children. The Taliban condemned the strikes for violating Afghan airspace and bombing civilian homes, reigniting a conflict that has caused numerous casualties.

events.title: IAEA Board Passes Resolution Demanding Iran Report Uranium Stocks
events.desc: The UN nuclear watchdog's Board of Governors approved a US-backed resolution requiring Iran to declare its remaining enriched uranium stocks and allow inspectors to verify them. The resolution, opposed by Russia and China, could impact ongoing negotiations with Iran.

events.title: US Hits China- and Hong Kong-Based Entities with Sanctions Over Iran Weapons
events.desc: The U.S. government imposed sanctions on 11 individuals and entities, including several in China and Hong Kong, for facilitating weapons procurement for Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps and military. This action targets Iran's weapons networks amid heightened tensions.

events.title: Israeli Settlers Impede Firefighting Near West Bank Village
events.desc: Israeli settlers reportedly obstructed Palestinian efforts to extinguish a large fire near Taybeh, a Christian village in the West Bank. This incident occurs amid rising strife and international sanctions against settler groups for violent attacks on Palestinians.

events.title: Trump Warns of More Attacks on Iran
events.desc: President Trump issued a stern warning of further attacks on Iran, stating the US will hit the country "very hard" if a peace deal is not finalized. This statement follows Iran's downing of a US Apache helicopter and increases pressure on Tehran.

events.title: Israeli Airstrikes Kill 17 in Southern Lebanon
events.desc: Reports indicate that Israeli airstrikes in southern Lebanon killed at least 17 people, with nine casualties in Tayr Debba. This follows recent exchanges of fire between Israel and Hezbollah, despite a US-brokered truce.

events.title: Three Indian Sailors Missing After US Hits Tanker in Gulf of Oman
events.desc: A tanker was struck by a missile fired from a US fighter jet in the Gulf of Oman, resulting in the disappearance of three Indian sailors and the rescue of 21 crew members. This incident occurred amid heightened maritime tensions.

events.title: US Strikes Iran in Response to Downing of Military Helicopter
events.desc: Following Iran's downing of a US military helicopter, President Donald Trump announced that the United States has launched retaliatory strikes against Iran, warning of further consequences.

events.title: Hungarian Government Passwords Exposed Online
events.desc: Approximately 800 Hungarian government email addresses and passwords have been leaked online, exposing vulnerabilities in ministries handling sensitive information. A Bellingcat analysis indicated that 12 out of 13 ministries were affected, potentially compromising confidential data.

events.title: Israeli Strikes Beirut Suburb Days After US-Brokered Truce
events.desc: Israel conducted strikes on a Beirut suburb, stating it was in response to Hezbollah firing at Israeli territory. This action occurred shortly after a US-brokered truce and follows recent exchanges of fire, indicating a fragile cessation of hostilities.

events.title: US and Iran Exchange Strikes in Gulf
events.desc: The US military conducted strikes against Iranian drones and radar sites, while Iran reported targeting US bases in Kuwait and Bahrain. This exchange represents a significant test of the existing ceasefire.

events.title: Trump Signs $70bn Immigration Enforcement Bill
events.desc: President Trump signed a $70 billion immigration enforcement bill following a standoff with Democrats. Immigrant advocates express concern over the bill's limited guardrails for ICE and CBP amid Trump's mass deportation plans.

events.title: One Dead, Five Injured After Shooting in Israel
events.desc: A shooting incident in Israel resulted in one fatality and five injuries when a suspect opened fire from a vehicle across multiple locations before being neutralized by security forces.
